dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gap opening detected when open > prev_close. Drop of 90 basis points (0.90%) approximated as returns < -0.009 (measured from prior close). Exit on next day reversal (close > open) or by max 1-day hold. Signal is specific to bonds and forex pairs; backtest should filter instruments accordingly. Original sample size noted as ~10 cases per instrument indicates limited statistical robustness.

backtest_rule.reason: Gap opening detected when open > prev_close. Drop of 90 basis points (0.90%) approximated as returns < -0.009 (measured from prior close). Exit on next day reversal (close > open) or by max 1-day hold. Signal is specific to bonds and forex pairs; backtest should filter instruments accordingly. Original sample size noted as ~10 cases per instrument indicates limited statistical robustness.

source_rule_text: When a gap opening shows a drop of at least 90 basis points, expect a reversal on the next open.
